privileged_info_summary: The task involves recording an immunization for Malka Hartmann (DOB: November 26, 1994, patient ID 12) in NOSH ChartingSystem. The patient data is from Synthea, a validated synthetic patient data generator using the Massachusetts cohort. The provider login is demo_provider with password Provider1234! for Hillside Family Medicine practice. The vaccine is Td (Tetanus and Diphtheria), manufactured by Sanofi Pasteur under the trade name TENIVAC. The administration date and lot number are task-specific test values. NOSH ChartingSystem is a real, open-source electronic health record system available on GitHub (shihjay2/nosh2).
